title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at CMC Vellore

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
